sqlMap.select: SELECT delaycolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #memberID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (userid, delaycolor, autodelete, tenantid) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #autoDelete#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET delaycolor = #delayColor#, autodelete = #autoDelete# WHERE userid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
